plugins.name: pdf-template-converter
plugins.description: Convert print-ready PDFs into self-contained Marketing Builder PRINT template folders (pdf-to-template: mapping.json MLS autofill + config-driven agent/co-agent branding + photo role tags) or data-driven EMAIL kits (pdf-to-email: kit.json with per-block MJML + inline listing/branding labels), with automated geometry probing, asset extraction, and browser-free or visual self-verification.
